name: CANoe CI Pipeline Reference
title: Internal CANoe CI/CD Pipeline (Jenkins + vTESTstudio)
intro: EQ07 uses Jenkins to run vTESTstudio test modules headlessly on every PR. Captures canonical pipeline, setup, and common failures.

paragraphs: Stage 1: compile - vTESTstudio CLI builds all .vtt modules.
Stage 2: smoke - 5-minute regression covering 80% of common paths.
Stage 3: full - 4-6 hour full regression, nightly.
Stage 4: report - HTML report with verdict, failed cases, timing.

tables: Missing include or DBC out of sync
Network not idle when test begins
Add 1s settle delay in test preamble
